calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Aug-26-2025 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jul-15-2025 Continued To Aug-26-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Charlene Usher for and with Juanita Gross, Petitioner (via Zoom).

The Court noted that the prior publication did not mention Juanita Gross as required. Ms. Usher requested a continuance to allow time to correct the mistake and republish.

The Court continued the matter to August 26, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, to allow time for proper publication.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jun-24-2025 Continued To Jul-15-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Charlene Usher appeared via zoom for and with Juanita Gross (petitioner).

Counsel stated that she filed a notice of petition and supplement that was rejected, that Pamela Pujo is not related to this matter, and that the written notice and publication will be corrected.

The Court shall extend the letters of special administration until the next hearing date of July 15, 2025. Counsel to provide a prosed order.

The matter is continued to July 15, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Thompson. Not reported.
